title: The Fletching Table Mod
description: This mod makes the unused Fletching Table block useful!
body: # Description There's an unused block in the game named the 'Fletching Table'. So, I decided to make this block useful by adding a much simple way to craft tipped arrows. This mod will give the ability to the Fletching Table block, by converting a normal arrow to a tipped arrow using a potion. One potion (any type) can transform any number of arrow from the first slot. ![fletching table gui](https://i.ibb.co/PWVGMbF/image-public-fletch.jpg) # Preview # JEI / REI Integration
